_meta.source: Repo-defined Vietnam regulatory regime registry composed from Decision 14/2025/QD-TTg, Decision 963/QD-BCT, Decree 57/2025/ND-CP, and Decree 146/2025/ND-CP reference materials
_meta.notes: Named regulatory bundles used to resolve tariff, export-rule, and post-processing assumptions without duplicating the full Vietnam data layer. Decision 963 is now the active default (effective 2026-04-22); Decision 14 is preserved as decision_14_2025_legacy.

decision_14_2025_current.notes: Backward-compatible redirect. Resolves to decision_14_2025_legacy for all tariff and export computations.

decision_14_2025_legacy.label: Decision 14/2025 legacy TOU (pre-963 split peak)
decision_14_2025_legacy.notes: Preserves the pre-Decision 963 TOU schedule: split peak 09:30-11:30 + 17:00-20:00 Mon-Sat. Use this regime to reproduce results under the old tariff structure.

decision_963_2026_current.label: Decision 963/2026 current active TOU (evening-only peak)
decision_963_2026_current.notes: Matches the repo's current baseline behavior with Decision 963/QD-BCT TOU windows (evening peak 17:30-22:30). Since the base tariff file now reflects Decision 963, no tariff_overrides are needed.

decision_963_2026_repriced_multipliers.label: Decision 963/2026 repriced-multiplier sensitivity

rate_multipliers_overrides.notes: Illustrative placeholder for repriced multipliers once MOIT publishes a replacement table.

decision_963_2026_repriced_multipliers.notes: Placeholder sensitivity bundle for a future multiplier reissue under Decision 963. Currently uses existing Decision 14 multipliers with Decision 963 windows.

decree57_rooftop_50pct_draft.label: Draft rooftop 50 percent surplus-export sensitivity
decree57_rooftop_50pct_draft.notes: Forward-looking draft scenario for a rooftop surplus-export cap increase from 20 percent to 50 percent.

decree146_two_part_trial_2026.label: Decree 146/2025 two-part tariff trial

postprocess_overrides.notes: Capacity payment remains a post-processing placeholder in Phase 1.

decree146_two_part_trial_2026.notes: Maps the medium-voltage trial capacity charge into a named regime without changing the base export policy.
